title: `dag-summary` interactive sign-off TUI — per-item acknowledgment, emits dag-transition
definition_of_done: dag-summary launches BubbleTea checklist; all items must be actioned (y/n/s) before sign-off unlocks; uncited nodes require explicit ID acknowledgment; sign-off emits dag-transition op; q without full sign-off emits no ops; make check green
outcome: BubbleTea dagsummary model with per-item y/n/s actions, uncited-node ID ack requirement, sign-off gate, dag-transition op emission; 22 unit tests; dagsum CLI updated to use draft-confidence collection; make check green
